[列]
Ideogrammic compound ( 會意 / 会意 ): 歹 ( “ skeletal remains ” ) + 刀 ( “ knife ” ) – to tear apart.
The seal script form can be analyzed as a phono-semantic compound ( 形聲 / 形声 , OC *red ): phonetic 𡿪 ( liè ) + semantic 刀 ( “ knife ” ) .

[裂]
Phono-semantic compound ( 形聲 / 形声 , OC *red ) and ideogrammic compound ( 會意 / 会意 ): phonetic 列 ( OC *red , “ to tear ” ) + semantic 衣 ( “ clothes ” ) — to cut and tear clothes. The phonetic 列 depicts bones being cut up with a blade and arranged in a line.
